title: 💸 How to Apply for PM Mudra Loan Online in 2026 🤑
metaTitle: PM Mudra Loan Online Application 2026 | Step-by-Step Guide 📈
metaDescription: Learn how to apply for PM Mudra Loan online in 2026 with our easy-to-follow guide. Get instant approval and funding for your business or personal needs 🏦
tableOfContents: Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan
Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan

intro.heading: 🌟 Introduction to PM Mudra Loan 🌟
intro.content: The PM Mudra Loan is a government-backed loan scheme designed to provide financial assistance to small businesses, entrepreneurs, and individuals in need of funds 🤑. With the aim of promoting economic growth and development, the scheme offers loans up to ₹10 lakhs at attractive interest rates 📈. In this article, we will guide you through the process of applying for a PM Mudra Loan online in 2026 🏦.

sections.heading: 📝 Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan 📝
sections.content: To be eligible for a PM Mudra Loan, you must meet the following criteria: you should be an Indian citizen, your business should be located in India, and you should have a valid business plan 📊. Additionally, you should have a good credit score and a stable income source 📈. The loan is available for various purposes, including business expansion, working capital, and equipment purchase 🛍️.

sections.heading: 📁 Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan 📁
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan, you will need to submit the following documents: identity proof (Aadhaar card, PAN card, etc.), address proof (passport, driving license, etc.), business proof (registration certificate, GST certificate, etc.), and income proof (salary slip, income tax return, etc.) 📝. You may also need to provide additional documents, such as a business plan, financial statements, and collateral documents 📊.

sections.heading: 📈 Step-by-Step Online Application Process 📈
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan online, follow these steps: visit the official website of the lender or the PM Mudra Loan portal 🌐, fill out the online application form with your personal and business details 📝, upload the required documents 📁, and submit the application 📈. You will receive an instant approval and funding decision, and the loan amount will be disbursed to your account within a few days 🏦.

sections.heading: 🎉 Benefits of PM Mudra Loan 🎉
sections.content: The PM Mudra Loan offers several benefits, including easy eligibility criteria, attractive interest rates, and flexible repayment terms 📊. The loan is also available for a wide range of purposes, including business expansion, working capital, and equipment purchase 🛍️. Additionally, the loan is backed by the government, which provides a guarantee for the loan amount 🏛️.

faqs.q: What is the interest rate for PM Mudra Loan?
faqs.a: The interest rate for PM Mudra Loan varies between 8.5% to 12.5% per annum, depending on the lender and the loan amount 📊.

faqs.q: What is the repayment term for PM Mudra Loan?
faqs.a: The repayment term for PM Mudra Loan varies between 3 to 7 years, depending on the loan amount and the lender 📆.

faqs.q: Can I apply for PM Mudra Loan online?
faqs.a: Yes, you can apply for PM Mudra Loan online through the official website of the lender or the PM Mudra Loan portal 🌐.
